specFidelityNotes: Reviewed uncommitted working tree (three-dot 8c707cc...HEAD empty; no #414 commits) against issue-context-cache-414 AC, scope-alignment-issue-414.md, and design docs (toasts, loading-indicators, navigation, charts). Typed packages/ui exports cover Toast/ToastViewport, LoadingSpinner/Skeleton/Indicator, isNavTabActive, PageHeader, and Recharts chart primitives (MetricSparkline, TrendAreaChart, TrendLineChart, ChartExpandableTile, ChartTextEquivalent) with theme CSS variable series colors, Vietnamese defaults, aria-live/reduced-motion on feedback loaders, keyboard-operable nav links and chart tile button, and import-boundary proof in packages/ui + apps/demo. PrimaryNavigation public API preserved; active-route logic refined via shared isNavTabActive. Scope stays compositions-only—no #413 surface files or destination screens.

smells.name: Duplicated Code
smells.hunk: MetricSparkline, TrendAreaChart, TrendLineChart, and ChartExpandableTile each repeat the same ChartTextEquivalent + aria-hidden visual wrapper pattern.

smells.name: Middle Man
smells.hunk: activateChartTile Enter/Space handler on a native <button> duplicates built-in keyboard activation.

convention_notes.note: #414-A and #414-B export blocks appended without reordering #397/#412 exports; matches established packages/ui convention.
Composition tests use loadUiStyles() token/reduced-motion assertions consistent with prior ui package tests.

reviewBasisNote: git diff 8c707cc (working tree) plus untracked packages/ui composition sources and tests; git diff 8c707cc...HEAD is empty (uncommitted implementation).
